name: J&J SNACK FOODS CORP
summary: J&J Snack Foods Corp. manufactures snack foods and distributes frozen beverages to the foodservice and retail supermarket industries. Key products include soft pretzels (SUPERPRETZEL, BRAUHAUS), frozen novelties (DIPPIN DOTS, LUIGIS, WHOLE FRUIT, ICEE), churros (HOLA!), bakery products (READI-BAKE, DADDY RAYS, HILL & VALLEY), and frozen beverages (ICEE, SLUSH PUPPIE, PARROT ICE). The company operates in three segments: Food Service, Retail Supermarkets, and Frozen Beverages, serving customers across the U.S., Mexico, and Canada.

products.name: SUPERPRETZEL / BRAUHAUS / FEDERAL PRETZEL / BAVARIAN BAKERY
products.description: Soft pretzel products sold in food service and retail supermarket channels, representing 18% of revenue in fiscal 2025.

products.name: DIPPIN DOTS / LUIGIS / WHOLE FRUIT / ICEE / DOGSTERS / PHILLY SWIRL / MINUTE MAID frozen novelties
products.description: Frozen novelty products sold in food service and retail supermarket segments, representing 16% of revenue in fiscal 2025.

products.name: HOLA! Churros
products.description: Frozen churros in various sizes and fillings sold to food service and retail supermarket segments, 6% of sales in fiscal 2025.

products.name: Handheld Products
products.description: Handheld food products sold primarily under private label to food service and retail supermarket segments, 7% of sales in fiscal 2025.

products.name: READI-BAKE / COUNTRY HOME / MARY B'S / DADDY RAYS / HILL & VALLEY Bakery Products
products.description: Bakery products including fig bars, cookies, breads, muffins, and donuts sold to food service segment, 27% of sales in fiscal 2025.

products.name: ICEE / SLUSH PUPPIE / PARROT ICE Frozen Beverages
products.description: Frozen carbonated and non-carbonated beverages sold in the U.S., Mexico, and Canada, representing 14% of revenue in fiscal 2025.

products.name: Equipment Repair and Maintenance Services
products.description: Repair and maintenance services for customer-owned frozen beverage dispensers; revenue totaled 9% of sales in fiscal 2025.

products.name: SUPERPRETZEL
products.description: Soft pretzel brand sold in food service and retail supermarket channels.

products.name: DIPPIN DOTS
products.description: Cryogenically frozen bead novelty product made using liquid nitrogen at -320°F.

products.name: LUIGIS Real Italian Ice
products.description: Frozen novelty juice cup product sold in food service and retail supermarket segments.

products.name: WHOLE FRUIT
products.description: Frozen fruit bars and sorbet sold in food service and retail supermarket segments.

products.name: ICEE
products.description: Frozen carbonated beverage brand sold in the U.S., Mexico, and Canada.

products.name: SLUSH PUPPIE
products.description: Frozen non-carbonated beverage sold through distributor and own distribution networks.

products.name: PARROT ICE
products.description: Frozen non-carbonated beverage brand sold in the U.S., Mexico, and Canada.

products.name: HOLA! Churros
products.description: Churros in stick form sold to food service and retail supermarket segments.

products.name: DADDY RAYS
products.description: Bakery product brand including fig and fruit bars sold to food service segment.

products.name: HILL & VALLEY
products.description: Bakery product brand sold to food service segment.

products.name: READI-BAKE
products.description: Bakery product brand including breads and rolls sold to food service segment.

products.name: DOGSTERS
products.description: Ice cream style treats for dogs sold in retail supermarket segment.

products.name: PHILLY SWIRL
products.description: Frozen novelty cups and sticks sold in food service and retail supermarket segments.

products.name: MINUTE MAID Frozen Novelties
products.description: Frozen juice bars and soft frozen lemonade sold under licensed Minute Maid brand.

partnerships.description: J&J licenses the Minute Maid trademark from the Coca-Cola Company for use on frozen novelty products.
J&J markets frozen beverages and frozen novelties under the ICEE brand name.
MINUTE MAID is a registered trademark of the Coca-Cola Company, licensed for use on frozen novelty products.
